nemetonshiny 0.18.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC-BY 4.0)

Scope: Data produced by Néméton — indicator values, species classifications, family scores, radar profiles, PDF reports, GeoPackage exports.

You are free to:

  • Share — copy and redistribute the data in any medium or format
  • Adapt — remix, transform, and build upon the data for any purpose, even commercially

Under the following terms:

  • Attribution — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made. You may do so in any reasonable manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.

Attribution format:

Data produced by Néméton (https://github.com/pobsteta/nemeton) — Pascal Obstétar, 2026. Licensed under CC-BY 4.0.

Full text:

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode

Why CC-BY 4.0?

  • Standard used by Copernicus, ESA, and European spatial agencies
  • Compatible with Licence Ouverte 2.0 (Etalab, France)
  • Allows commercial reuse with attribution
  • Recommended for open data in the European Union

Copyright

Copyright (c) 2026 Pascal Obstétar

The data produced by Néméton is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License. To view a copy of this license, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/.
